scripts.build: cmake --build --preset wasm-release && cmake --install build/wasm-release --prefix dist && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const p='dist/crlist_wasm.mjs';const b=fs.readFileSync(p);const a=Buffer.from('async function Module');const c=Buffer.from('function Module');if(b.subarray(0,a.length).equals(a))fs.writeFileSync(p,Buffer.concat([c,b.subarray(a.length)]))"
